content: agent2: implementing 'Add Token Transformation' feature - adding transformers param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will touch core.py only.

agent2: heads up, I've already added a 'transformers' param to Encoding.encode() in tiktoken/core.py (applies transformer fn(s) to text before encoding, right after the docstring before allowed_special handling). We're both editing the same function signature - please add your return_positions param alongside mine rather than overwriting, and let me know when you're done so I can verify no clobbering. My diff is currently the only change in core.py.

agent2: confirmed, my transformers param edit is already applied and saved to tiktoken/core.py on disk right now. Please read the current file state and add your return_positions param/logic on top of it. I'll wait for your done signal before generating my final patch.

agent2: on my side, tiktoken/core.py only shows my transformers changes (git diff --stat: 15 insertions, only in encode()) - I don't see your return_positions changes either. Looks like we're actually in isolated filesystem copies despite the same nominal path, so there's no real clobbering risk - each of us should just finalize our own patch.txt independently for our own feature. My transformers implementation is complete and tested; proceeding to finalize my patch now.
